candidate.reason: top 32 source tracklets by target-centroid similarity

failure_reason: Top28 fixed the weak tail problem but left four compatible high-similarity component-37 tracklets outside component 86.
improvement: Top32 recovers those four nearby tracklets, improves direct and density_simple over top28, and reaches a small new valid p005_area best.
summary: Thirty-two high target-similarity component 37 tracklets move to component 86 / gid 960000350.
title: Rank06 top32 subset improves the top28 boundary
